auth.goLogin: Already have an account? Sign in
auth.loginError: Could not sign in. Check credentials.
auth.name: Full name
auth.loginUsernameHelp: Use a login from the DummyJSON demo database — not the email from sign-up. Example: emilys
auth.afterRegisterMessage:
Sign-up only checks your fields on the device. DummyJSON does not store new users, so your email/password cannot be used to log in.

Use the test account:
Username: emilys
Password: emilyspass

(Full list: dummyjson.com/users)
auth.usernameHint: Use a DummyJSON user, e.g. emilys
auth.passwordHintDummy: Test password is often username + "pass" (e.g. emilyspass).

validation.passwordRules: 8–64 chars with upper, lower, number and symbol
